title: Trinkets
description: A mod that adds little trinkets, that give effects.
body:
Adds a couple of trinkets, one for almost all positive effects.

All Effects Are: Jump Boost, Fire Resistance, Resistance, Slow Falling, Levitation, Water Breathing, Night Vision, Invisibility, Regenaration, Strenght, Luck, and Dolphins's Grace.
Craft some, and right click! If it does nothing, then it's a material, and if it has an effect, suprise! The effect is mostly relavent to the item. (Ex: Medical Kit is regeneration.)
